description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a camouflage paint scheme featuring green, brown, and tan colors, accented by red Soviet star insignias on the wings and tail. The airplane has a swept-wing design with low-mounted wings and a single jet engine exhaust at the rear. The fuselage is streamlined, with a pointed nose and a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both swept back. Visible underwing pylons suggest the capability to carry external stores or armaments. The overall appearance is that of a classic Cold War-era fighter jet, robust and built for high-speed flight.
description: A camouflaged military jet with swept low wings, Soviet star insignias, and a bubble canopy cockpit near the nose. The aircraft features a single rear jet engine and a conventional swept tail.
description_view_0: Rear oblique view showing the single jet exhaust, swept-back wings, and tail with Soviet star insignias.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the camouflage pattern, swept wings, underwing pylons, and cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, intake, bubble canopy, and the symmetry of the swept wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, with clear visibility of the tail and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with moderate anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and swept horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with two main gear and one nose gear visible in stowed position
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single-seat
